query:
UPDATE media.movies
               SET ratings_json = $2,
                   poster_path  = COALESCE(poster_path, $3),
                   poster_urls  = CASE WHEN $3::text IS NOT NULL AND NOT ($3 = ANY(poster_urls))
                                       THEN array_append(poster_urls, $3)
                                       ELSE poster_urls END
               WHERE id = $1
